sentences: Google's cheaper tiers match or beat its own flagship — Gemini 3.5 Flash at 100% and Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at 95%, against the flagship's 95% — so within that lab, on this suite, paying more buys no accuracy.
Grok 4.3 answers with 20.1x the characters of the tersest model — it explains instead of answering, and lands at 77%.
Llama 3.1 8B answers fastest and scores lowest (131 ms at 59%) — a speed/quality tradeoff you can see rather than argue about.
html: A frozen, deterministically-graded suite against 16 models across 5 labs. Google's cheaper tiers match or beat its own flagship — Gemini 3.5 Flash at 100% and Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at 95%, against the flagship's 95% — so within that lab, on this suite, paying more buys no accuracy. Grok 4.3 answers with 20.1x the characters of the tersest model — it explains instead of answering, and lands at 77%. Llama 3.1 8B answers fastest and scores lowest (131 ms at 59%) — a speed/quality tradeoff you can see rather than argue about. Generated from the run of 18 Jul 2026 — this paragraph is rebuilt from the board's own numbers, never hand-written.
